reference: My problem started with pain from the top of my thigh to my knee. Now the pain is concentrated in my knee area. I can't sleep on my side, as the pain really intensifies then. I can sleep in a recliner with little pain, but if I am on my leg too long, it starts to hurt. I have been taking Aleve for a week, and the pain still persists. I have had an X-ray and blood work, and nothing has shown up. Any advice or ideas as to what this could be?
text: What's the difference between a pilot and a doctor? One can only cure your health problems but the other can also fly you away from them.
